name: Look Holdings Incorporated
summary: Look Holdings Incorporated, together with its subsidiaries, engages in planning, manufacturing, and selling women's apparels and related accessories in Japan, South Korea, Europe, China, Hong Kong, the United States, and China. Its products include handbag and leather goods; fashion, home interiors, and design products; and ballet shoes. The company offers its products under the BENSIMON, Repetto, MARIMEKKO, KEITH, LAISS√É¬â PASS√É¬â, A.P.C., IL BISONTE, and Gelateria Marghera brands. It also manufactures and sells gelato; and provides logistics services. The company sells its products through its physical and online stores. The company was formerly known as Look Incorporated and changed its name to Look Holdings Incorporated in January 2018. Look Holdings Incorporated was founded in 1962 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
